name: Debounce
description: Debounces a source key on object userData into an output key.
author: stemstudio
documentation:
## Debounce

Debounces a source key on object userData into an output key.

### Runtime Notes
- Attach this lambda to objects via Lambda Components.
- If Auto Apply is enabled, it runs every frame.
- If Auto Apply is disabled, call `lambdaInstance.apply(deltaTime)` from behavior/lambda code.

### Component Parameters
| Key | Label | Type | Default | Options |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `sourceKey` | Source Key | `string` | `` | - |
| `outputKey` | Output Key | `string` | `debouncedValue` | - |
| `delaySeconds` | Delay Seconds | `number` | `0.2` | - |
